title: Creating one-page views of a single project
excerpt: For any given project (a single  row) on my board, I’d like to be able to create a print-friendly one-page document that shows all that project’s attributes/fields, for example, in a portrait style Word/PDF doc.  I’d lik…

posts.author: jasperchen (Jasper C)
posts.cookedHtml:
For any given project (a single row) on my board, I’d like to be able to create a print-friendly one-page document that shows all that project’s attributes/fields, for example, in a portrait style Word/PDF doc. I’d like to be able to hit a button that creates this view so I can quickly print it out for a client meeting to talk about the status of that single project. It’d be great if that same button was also able to send me an email with the same view but with that in the body of the message.

Does anyone know how that can be done on Monday.com?

posts.author: bgoud230 (Brion Goudreau)
posts.cookedHtml: any luck on this one? I’m trying to get he same view.

posts.author: jasperchen (Jasper C)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately no response from anyone in the community. The folks at Monday showed me that they’re rolling out Items Cards (open the item on the board, see the right side panel) that can be customized with widgets. That was the best they were able to offer.
